data.name: A11y_Btn_Minus_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the minus button in numeric input dialogs.

data.name: A11y_Btn_Plus_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the plus button in numeric input dialogs.

data.name: Btn_Minus
data.comment: Display text for the minus button.

data.name: Btn_Plus
data.comment: Display text for the plus button.

data.name: A11y_State_Focused
data.comment: Appended to AccessibleDescription when a button gains focus.

data.name: A11y_State_Hover
data.comment: State text appended to the accessibility description when the control is hovered.

data.name: A11y_BtnCopyDesc
data.value: Copies the text from the input box to the clipboard.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the copy button, explaining its function.

data.name: A11y_BtnCopyName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the copy button.

data.name: A11y_Cannot_Delete
data.comment: Accessibility message played when backspace is pressed at the start of the text.

data.name: A11y_Capture_Cancelled
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the user cancels the hotkey capture process.

data.name: A11y_Capture_Esc_Cancel
data.comment: Accessibility message informing users that they can press ESC to cancel capture.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Char
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a single character is deleted. {0} is the deleted character.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Char_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe version of character deletion accessibility message.

data.name: A11y_CurrentValue
data.comment: Accessibility message showing the current value in settings dialogs. {0} is the current value.

data.name: A11y_Hotkey_Captured
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a new hotkey is successfully captured. {0} is the resulting hotkey string.

data.name: A11y_MainFormDesc
data.value: Press A or Start to open keyboard when empty, or copy and return when text is entered. Use X to backspace, D-pad to move cursor or history. Press Back to return. LB + RB + B to quick return. LB + RB + X to exit. Keyboard: Enter to copy/open, Esc to clear, Up/Down for history, Alt + B to return.
data.comment: Detailed accessibility description for the main window, explaining various controller and keyboard operations.

data.name: A11y_Returning
data.comment: Accessibility message played when an action is completed and focus is about to return to the previous window.

data.name: A11y_MainFormName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the main window.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Bottom
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the cursor reaches the end of the text.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Newest
data.comment: Accessibility message played when navigating history back to the newest input.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Oldest
data.comment: Accessibility message played when navigating history to the oldest item with no more records.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Top
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the cursor reaches the beginning of the text.

data.name: A11y_Selected_Text
data.comment: Announces the currently selected text content

data.name: A11y_Selected_Text_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe version of text selection message.

data.name: A11y_Cursor_Move
data.comment: Announces the current absolute cursor position.

data.name: A11y_Cursor_Move_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe version of cursor movement accessibility message.

data.name: A11y_No_Text_To_Copy
data.comment: Accessibility message played when attempting to copy empty text.

data.name: A11y_TBInputDesc
data.value: Enter the text you want to copy to the clipboard here.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the input field, guiding users to enter content.

data.name: A11y_TBInputName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the input field.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Main
data.comment: Accessibility label for the main layout container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Main_Desc
data.value: Container holding the text input and action buttons.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the main layout container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Input
data.comment: Accessibility label for the input area container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Input_Desc
data.value: Container housing the text input field.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the input area container.

data.name: App_Title
data.comment: Application name used in window titles and message dialogs.

data.name: Btn_CopyDefault
data.comment: Default display text for the copy button.

data.name: Err_ConfigInvalid
data.value: The configuration file format is invalid. The application will start with default settings.
data.comment: Error message displayed when the config file is corrupted or formatted incorrectly.

data.name: Err_HotkeyRegFail
data.value:
Global hotkey {0} failed to register.
Make sure that multiple instances of this application are not running at the same time, or that another application is not already using this hotkey.
data.comment: Detailed error message when global hotkey registration fails. {0} is the attempted hotkey.

data.name: Err_Title
data.comment: Title text for error dialogs.

data.name: Err_TouchKeyboardNotFound
data.comment: Error message when the system touch keyboard cannot be launched.

data.name: Menu_CaptureKey
data.comment: Context menu item to start capturing a new wake-up key.

data.name: Menu_CaptureKey_Desc
data.value: Start capturing a new key from the keyboard.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the capture key menu item.

data.name: Menu_ClearHistory
data.comment: Context menu item to empty input history.

data.name: Menu_ClearHistory_Desc
data.value: Permanently clear all input records currently in memory.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the clear history menu item.

data.name: Menu_HotkeySettings
data.comment: Submenu name for hotkey related configurations.

data.name: Menu_HotkeySettings_Desc
data.value: Configure the global hotkeys to wake up the input box.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the hotkey settings submenu.

data.name: Menu_PrivacyMode
data.comment: Context menu item to toggle privacy mode.

data.name: Menu_PrivacyMode_Desc
data.value: When enabled, new inputs will not be saved to history.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the privacy mode menu item.

data.name: Mod_Alt
data.comment: Display name for the Alt modifier key in settings.

data.name: Mod_Ctrl
data.comment: Display name for the Ctrl modifier key in settings.

data.name: Mod_Shift
data.comment: Display name for the Shift modifier key in settings.

data.name: Mod_Win
data.comment: Display name for the Windows logo modifier key in settings.

data.name: Msg_Copied
data.comment: Temporary status text shown on button after successful copy.

data.name: Msg_CopyFail
data.comment: Status text shown on button when copy fails.

data.name: Msg_HotkeyUpdated
data.comment: Status message shown when hotkey is successfully updated.

data.name: Msg_InputCleared
data.comment: Status message shown when input box is cleared.

data.name: Msg_PressAnyKey
data.comment: Prompt asking users to press a key in capture mode.

data.name: Pht_TBInput
data.comment: Hint text (placeholder) shown when the input box is empty.

data.name: Wrn_Title
data.comment: Title text for warning dialogs.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Connected
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a controller connection is detected. {0} is index or name.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Disconnected
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a controller is disconnected. {0} is index or name.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Multiple
data.comment: Accessibility message played when multiple characters are deleted at once. {0} is the count.

data.name: A11y_New_Line
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a new line is added to the input field.

data.name: Err_HotkeyRegFail_Brief
data.value: Hotkey registration failed. Reverted to previous setting.
data.comment: Short error message when hotkey registration fails and reverts.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Fallback
data.value: GameInput initialization failed. Switched to XInput compatibility mode.
data.comment: Accessibility message when GameInput is unavailable and auto-switches to XInput.

data.name: A11y_PrivacyMode_On
data.comment: Accessibility message when privacy mode is turned on.

data.name: A11y_PrivacyMode_Off
data.comment: Accessibility message when privacy mode is turned off.

data.name: A11y_History_Navigation
data.comment: Accessibility message for navigating history records. {0} is index, {1} is total, {2} is content.

data.name: A11y_Startup_Status
data.comment: Startup accessibility status summary. {0} is privacy status, {1} is current hotkey.

data.name: Menu_Settings
data.comment: Submenu name containing various advanced settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Window
data.comment: Context menu item for window and operation related settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Feedback
data.comment: Context menu item for vibration feedback settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Gamepad
data.comment: Context menu item for gamepad related settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Vibration
data.comment: Context menu item to toggle vibration on or off.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Intensity
data.comment: Context menu item showing and setting vibration intensity. {0} is percentage.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Provider
data.comment: Context menu item showing current gamepad input API info.

data.name: Menu_Settings_HistoryCapacity
data.comment: Context menu item showing and setting history capacity. {0} is current capacity.

data.name: Menu_OpenDataFolder
data.comment: Context menu item for opening the application folder in AppData Roaming.

data.name: Menu_OpenDataFolder_Desc
data.value: Open the application data folder in AppData.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Open Folder menu item.

data.name: Settings_WindowRestoreDelay
data.comment: Setting name for delay when window is restored.

data.name: Settings_ClipboardRetryDelay
data.comment: Setting name for retry interval when clipboard is busy.

data.name: Settings_TouchKeyboardDismissDelay
data.comment: Setting name for delay when touch keyboard is closed.

data.name: Settings_WindowSwitchBufferBase
data.comment: Setting name for base buffer time when switching focus back to target window.

data.name: Settings_InputJitterRange
data.comment: Setting name for random jitter range in focus switching.

data.name: Settings_HistoryCapacity
data.comment: Setting name for max records in input history.

data.name: Settings_ThumbDeadzoneEnter
data.comment: Setting name for stick deadzone entry threshold.

data.name: Settings_ThumbDeadzoneExit
data.comment: Setting name for stick deadzone exit threshold.

data.name: Settings_RepeatDelay
data.comment: Setting name for repeat input delay on controllers.

data.name: Settings_RepeatSpeed
data.comment: Setting name for repeat input speed on controllers.

data.name: Msg_RestartRequired
data.value: This change requires a restart to take effect. Restart now?
data.comment: Prompt message informing users that a restart is required for settings to apply.

data.name: Msg_EnterValue
data.value: Please enter a new value for {0}:
data.comment: Prompt text for numeric input dialogs. {0} is the item name.

data.name: Btn_OK
data.comment: OK button text in dialog boxes.

data.name: Btn_Cancel
data.comment: Cancel button text in dialog boxes.

data.name: Btn_SetDefault
data.comment: Reset to default button text in dialog boxes.

data.name: Settings_VibrationIntensity
data.comment: Setting name for vibration intensity adjustment.

data.name: A11y_Menu_NumericDesc
data.comment: Accessibility template for numeric menu items. {0} is name, {1} is current, {2} is min, {3} is max.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Toggle_Desc
data.value: Toggle {0} as a modifier for the wake up hotkey.
data.comment: Accessibility description for modifier toggles. {0} is modifier name.

data.name: A11y_Value_Max
data.comment: Accessibility announcement when the numeric input reaches its upper limit.

data.name: A11y_Value_Min
data.comment: Accessibility announcement when the numeric input reaches its lower limit.

data.name: A11y_Value_Range_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for numeric input fields including range info. {0} is current, {1} is min, {2} is max.

data.name: A11y_Btn_OK_Desc
data.value: Confirm and apply the current value.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the OK button.

data.name: A11y_Btn_Cancel_Desc
data.value: Cancel changes and close the dialog.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Cancel button.

data.name: A11y_Btn_SetDefault_Desc
data.value: Reset the value to the factory default: {0}.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Reset button. {0} is the factory default value.

data.name: A11y_Btn_SetDefault_Group_Desc
data.value: Reset all settings in this group to their factory defaults.
data.comment: Accessibility description for Reset buttons that reset multiple settings at once (e.g., window ops, feedback, gamepad).

data.name: A11y_Grid_Numeric_Desc
data.value: Contains the numeric input field and increment/decrement buttons.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the numeric input grid container in NumericInputDialog.

data.name: A11y_Mod_On
data.comment: Accessibility message when a modifier key is turned on. {0} is the name.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Off
data.comment: Accessibility message when a modifier key is turned off. {0} is the name.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Key_Missing
data.comment: Accessibility message reminding users that the main hotkey is not yet set.

data.name: A11y_Clipboard_Retrying
data.comment: Accessibility message when clipboard is occupied and auto-retrying.

data.name: A11y_Cancelled
data.comment: Accessibility message when a general operation is cancelled.

data.name: A11y_Checked
data.comment: Accessibility status for checked menu items.

data.name: A11y_Unchecked
data.comment: Accessibility status for unchecked menu items.

data.name: A11y_Opening_Keyboard
data.comment: Accessibility message when launching the touch keyboard.

data.name: App_Privacy_Suffix
data.comment: Icon marker appended to window title when privacy mode is on.

data.name: App_Gamepad_Suffix
data.comment: Controller info shown in window title. {0} is controller name.

data.name: App_Gamepad_XInput_Format
data.comment: Name format for XInput devices. {0} is controller index.

data.name: A11y_Background_Error
data.comment: Accessibility message reporting background worker errors. {0} is detailed error info.

data.name: A11y_ButtonArea
data.comment: Accessibility group label name for the main action buttons area.

data.name: Menu_Exit
data.comment: Context menu item to close and end the application.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Settings_Desc
data.value: Open advanced settings including window behavior, feedback, and gamepad options.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Settings menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_WinOps_Desc
data.value: Configure window restore delays and clipboard retry settings.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Window & Operations menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Feedback_Desc
data.value: Configure vibration feedback and intensity levels.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Feedback settings menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Gamepad_Desc
data.value: Configure controller deadzones, repeat speed, and API provider.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Gamepad settings menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_VibEnable_Desc
data.value: Toggle all controller vibration effects on or off.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the vibration toggle item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Provider_Desc
data.value: Select the underlying API for controller input (GameInput or XInput).
data.comment: Accessibility description for the API provider item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Provider_GameInput_Desc
data.value: Use Microsoft's modern GameInput API. Recommended for modern controllers.
data.comment: Accessibility description for GameInput provider option.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Provider_XInput_Desc
data.value: Use legacy XInput API. Best for compatibility with older devices.
data.comment: Accessibility description for XInput provider option.

data.name: A11y_Settings_RestartRequired
data.comment: Suffix added to accessibility descriptions for settings that require an app restart.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Exit_Desc
data.value: Quit the application and release all resources.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Exit menu item.

data.name: A11y_TargetWindowLost
data.value: Cannot return: The target window has been closed.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt when user tries to return to a non-existent target window.

data.name: A11y_SkipNav_JumpToInput
data.comment: Announced when Ctrl+M is pressed to jump to the main text input field (WCAG 2.4.1 skip navigation).

data.name: A11y_SnapBack
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when the window is snapped back from off-screen.

data.name: Settings_WindowOpacity
data.comment: Setting item name for window transparency level.

data.name: A11y_Menu_OpacityDesc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the opacity menu item. {0} is label, {1} is percentage.

data.name: A11y_Opacity_Changed
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when opacity changes. {0} is percentage.

data.name: A11y_Opacity_HighContrast
data.value: High Contrast mode is on, opacity locked to 100%.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when opacity is forced to 100% due to High Contrast.

data.name: Err_GamepadInitFail
data.value: Gamepad controller initialization failed. Some features may be unavailable.
data.comment: Error message played via A11y when the gamepad controller fails to initialize at startup.

data.name: Menu_ApplyThemeRestart
data.comment: Menu item prompting the user to restart the application to fully apply dark/light theme changes.

data.name: A11y_Theme_Changed_Hint
data.value: System theme has changed. Please select "Apply System Theme" from the context menu to restart the application and fully apply visual effects.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when a theme change is detected and requires a manual restart.

data.name: App_ThemePending_Suffix
data.comment: Icon marker displayed in the title bar when a system theme change is detected but the application hasn't been restarted yet.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Submenu_Enter
data.comment: Announce when entering a submenu using gamepad

data.name: A11y_Menu_Submenu_Exit
data.comment: Announce when exiting a submenu using gamepad

data.name: Menu_A11yInterrupt
data.comment: Context menu item that toggles whether screen reader announcements can interrupt the previous one (WCAG 2.2.4).

data.name: Menu_A11yInterrupt_Desc
data.value: Allow announcements to interrupt the previous one. Disable to hear every message in full.
data.comment: Accessible description for the interrupt announcements toggle menu item.

data.name: A11y_A11yInterrupt_On
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when the interrupt-announcements setting is turned on.

data.name: A11y_A11yInterrupt_Off
data.value: Interrupt announcements disabled. All messages will be announced in full.
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when the interrupt-announcements setting is turned off.

data.name: Menu_Help
data.comment: Context menu item that opens the help dialog (WCAG 3.3.5).

data.name: Menu_Help_Desc
data.value: Show keyboard shortcuts and gamepad controls (F1)
data.comment: Accessible description for the Help menu item.

data.name: Help_Title
data.comment: Title bar text of the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Section_Keyboard
data.comment: Section heading inside the Help dialog for the keyboard shortcut table.

data.name: Help_Section_Gamepad
data.comment: Section heading inside the Help dialog for the gamepad controls table.

data.name: Help_Col_Key
data.comment: Column header for the key/button column in the keyboard shortcut table inside the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Col_Button
data.comment: Column header for the button column in the gamepad controls table inside the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Col_Action
data.comment: Column header for the action description column in both tables inside the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Btn_Close
data.comment: Label for the Close button in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Keyboard_Group
data.comment: Accessible name for the keyboard shortcuts section container in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Gamepad_Group
data.comment: Accessible name for the gamepad controls section container in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Keyboard_Rows
data.value: Esc Clear input / Return to game (if empty) Enter Copy to clipboard and return to game F1 Open this Help dialog ↑ Previous history entry ↓ Next history entry ← Move cursor left → Move cursor right Shift+← Select text leftward Shift+→ Select text rightward Home / End Jump cursor to line start / end Ctrl+← / → Move cursor by word Backspace Delete previous character or selection Delete Delete next character Alt+B Return to game without copying Alt+↑ / ↓ Increase / decrease window opacity (+5% / −5%) Alt+0 Reset window opacity (100%) Alt+P Toggle privacy mode F10 / Alt+M Open context menu Ctrl+M Jump to text input
data.comment: Tab-separated rows for the keyboard shortcut table in the Help dialog. Format: Key{tab}Action. One row per line.

data.name: Help_Gamepad_Rows
data.value: A / Start Copy to clipboard and return to game B Clear input text LB+RB+B Return to game (when input is empty) Back (release) Return to game Y Open context menu X Delete previous character or selection LB+RB+X Exit application Back+X Reset window opacity ↑ / ↓ Navigate history ← / → Move cursor RS ← / → Expand or shrink selection Back+↑ / ↓ Adjust window opacity (+5% / −5%)
data.comment: Tab-separated rows for the gamepad controls table in the Help dialog. Format: Button{tab}Action. One row per line.
